box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;

div.div: 所有権の 3 つのルール

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 317px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ルール 1: 各値は 1 つの所有者だけを持つ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 342px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: → 1 つの値を複数の変数が同時に所有することはできない

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ルール 2: 所有者がスコープを抜けると値は自動で解放される

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 392px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: → GC 不要。メモリリークのリスクを根本的に排除する

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 417px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ルール 3: 共有参照（&T）は複数可、排他参照（&mut T）は 1 つだけ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 442px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: → データ競合をコンパイル時に防止する

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
